_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill to orchestrate intelligence planning teams, coordinate collection and production support, and monitor status.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including talent acquisition, onboarding design, performance management, career development planning, and succession preparation.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.618), LS-S-007 (LS, cosine: 0.597).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.0/10 (raw 0.697). Shared vocabulary: [planning, skill, teams]. DCWF-only terms [collection, coordinate, intelligence, monitor, orchestrate, production] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.888 (P=0.896, R=0.880). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.9%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill to orchestrate intelligence planning teams, coordinate collection and prod" and "Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including ta". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.727 ≈ STS 0.697 (gap 0.030). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [planning, skill, teams] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [planning, skill, teams]. DCWF-only: [collection, coordinate, intelligence, monitor, orchestrate, production]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.9% on Superset of classification. The matched KSA operates in a different professional domain than the obligation/competency requires. STS 0.697 passed the threshold but secondary signals contradict the match.
